faqs.question: How much does bed bug treatment cost in Port Chester?
faqs.answer: Bed bug treatment in Port Chester typically ranges from $1,200 to $3,500, depending on the size of your property, severity of infestation, and treatment method selected. We offer free inspections and upfront pricing for all Port Chester residents before beginning any work.

faqs.question: What bed bug treatment methods do you use in Port Chester?
faqs.answer: We offer both heat treatment and targeted chemical applications for Port Chester properties. Heat treatment raises room temperatures to 135°F+ to kill bed bugs at all life stages, while our EPA-approved chemical treatments provide residual protection. Our technicians will recommend the best method based on your specific situation.

faqs.question: How quickly can you treat bed bugs in Port Chester homes?
faqs.answer: We typically offer same-day or next-day service for Port Chester residents experiencing bed bug emergencies. Most treatments can be completed in one day, though severe infestations may require follow-up visits. We serve all Port Chester neighborhoods including areas near Village Hall, Lyon Park, and the Byram River waterfront.

faqs.question: Do you guarantee your bed bug treatments in Port Chester?
faqs.answer: Yes, all our bed bug treatments in Port Chester come with a 90-day warranty. If bed bugs return within this period, we'll re-treat your property at no additional cost. We also provide detailed prevention guidance to help keep your Port Chester home bed bug-free long-term.
